name: PM Kisan
description: Provides financial assistance of ₹6,000 per year to eligible farmer families.
benefits: ₹2,000 is credited in three installments every year.

name: Ayushman Bharat
description: Provides health insurance coverage up to ₹5 lakh per family.
eligibility: Eligible families identified under SECC data.

name: Startup India
description: Supports startups through tax benefits, funding, and simplified compliance.
benefits: Funding support, tax exemptions, and incubation.
